title: Tender Crunchy Spanish Hazelnut Stir-fry
description: A sour and crowd-pleasing Spanish dish featuring shelled hazelnuts in a gluten-free-friendly stir-fry recipe.
instructions: Place chicken breasts in a baking dish. Season with salt and pepper.
Roast the chicken for about 20 minutes until fully cooked. Remove from oven and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic, sautéing until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add chopped hazelnuts to the skillet and stir fry for an additional 2-3 minutes until fragrant.
Pour in vegetable broth, add red pepper flakes, and mix well. Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to low.
Slice chicken breasts into thin strips and place them gently into the skillet with the hazelnut mixture, ensuring not to overcrowd the pan.
Cover with a lid if available for steaming purposes or simply by placing aluminum foil over it until heated through. This should take around 10 minutes.
Once done, remove from heat and stir in sour cream gently before serving. Garnish with fresh parsley if desired.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course based on preference.
